models.name: Qwen 2.5 3B Instruct
models.description: Fast default for chat. Good quality at ~2 GB. Recommended for first-time setup.

models.name: Qwen 2.5 7B Instruct
models.description: Stronger reasoning and writing. ~4.4 GB single-file Q4_K_M quant. Fits comfortably on a 24 GB GPU.

models.name: Llama 3.2 3B Instruct
models.description: Meta's compact instruct model. Similar size to Qwen 3B, different style.

models.name: Phi-3 Mini 4K Instruct
models.description: Microsoft's small model. Efficient on CPU or GPU.

models.name: Mistral 7B Instruct v0.2
models.description: Classic 7B instruct model. Higher quality, needs more VRAM at long context.
